root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: order by c1 desc limit 1)) as subq_2 (tests/integrationtest/r/planner/core/tests/prepare/issue.result).
